summary: hello244a postinstall performs Docker host-escape and exfiltrates results to pipedream webhook
details: package.json declares a postinstall script that runs on `npm install` and executes `docker run --rm -v /:/host alpine sh -c...` to bind-mount the host root filesystem into a container, write a proof file to `/host/tmp/escape_proof.txt`, and read the host's `/etc/hostname`. It then POSTs the collected host identifier and write-proof to a hardcoded attacker webhook at `eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net` via `https.request`. Installing the package auto-executes attacker-controlled code that attempts a container-to-host escape and reports success back to an external endpoint, with no legitimate purpose consistent with any declared functionality.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
